channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A private European aerospace startup completes the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle
item.description: A rocket by a private European aerospace company launched from Norway on Sunday and crashed into the sea 30 seconds later.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tesla protests across Bay Area ignite Trump resistance, but intra-party strife ahead
item.description: After almost stunned paralysis among Democrats in the early weeks of Trump’s onslaught of executive orders, the Trump resistance is gaining traction.
item.dc:creator: Julia Prodis Sulek, The Mercury News

item.title: Everything new on Disney+ in April 2025: Andor season 2, Doctor Who season 15, Dying for Sex, and more
item.description: From the return of hugely popular shows to new movies, here's what you'll want to watch on Disney+ in April.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: New wave of smaller, cheaper nuclear reactors sends US states racing to attract the industry
item.description: U.S. states are positioning themselves to compete for newer, cheaper nuclear reactors being developed as communities and tech giants compete in a race for electricity.
item.dc:creator: Marc Levy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Democrats ask ethics office to investigate Lutnick Tesla promotion
item.description: More than a dozen Democratic lawmakers asked the Office of Government Ethics on Thursday to open an investigation into Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick’s promotion of Tesla stock. Rep. Maxine Waters (D-Calif.), Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Elon Musk sells X to his own xAI for $33 billion in all-stock deal
item.description: Elon Musk has sold social media site X to his own xAI artificial intelligence company in a $33 billion all-stock deal, the billionaire announced on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Elon Musk says he sold X to his AI company
item.description: Elon Musk on Friday evening announced he has sold his social media company, X, to xAI, his artificial intelligence company, in a deal that values X at $33 billion.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Ubuntu namespace vulnerability should be addressed quickly: Expert
item.description: Linux admins who have enabled the unprivileged user namespace restriction in their recent Ubuntu environments should take action to close three new vulnerabilities that allow a threat actor to bypass the supposed protection.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Group chats rule the world
item.description: How many group chats are you involved in? For me, it varies. Right now, there are only two — and both are of a more private nature.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tiny Silicon Valley drugmaker soars on FDA win to treat never-ending hunger
item.description: Shares of the Redwood City-based Soleno Therapeutics climbed 38% — the biggest one-day gain since September 2023 — to their highest level in more than eight years.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: La transformación digital, esencial para la supervivencia del sector asegurador
item.description: Los beneficios de la transformación digital ya son palpables para el sector asegurador. Así lo constata el informe Perspectivas de tecnología en seguros 2025: transformando la innovación en ventaja competitiva que firma Concentrix.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nvidia-backed CoreWeave slashes IPO size and price amid investor concerns
item.description: CoreWeave plans to reduce the size of its U.S. initial public offering and price its shares below the indicated range, a person familiar with the matter told Reuters on Thursday, dampening expectations that the listing would boost investor appetite for IPOs.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: X Owner Elon Musk's Public Pressure on Reddit Exposed
item.description: Elon Musk was privately messaging with Reddit CEO Steve Huffman while also putting public pressure on the social media company's content moderation efforts, The Verge reported Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: An AI pioneer is launching a blockchain-powered marketplace for open-source models and applications
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft lauds Hyperlight Wasm for WebAssembly workloads
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled Hyperlight Wasm, a virtual machine “micro-guest” that can run WebAssembly component workloads written in a multitude of languages including C and Python. Introduced March 26, Hyperlight Wasm serves as a Rust library crate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump family crypto firm launches stablecoin
item.description: World Liberty Financial, a cryptocurrency venture created by President Trump and his sons, announced plans Tuesday to launch a stablecoin. The stablecoin, USD1, will be pegged to the U.S. dollar. Stablecoins are cryptocurrencies tied to assets, like fiat currency, to maintain a more stable price.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Canada bars Tesla from rebate program over Trump tariffs
item.description: Canada has barred electric vehicle (EV) giant Tesla from all of its rebate programs and banned the Texas-based automotive company from future electric vehicle rebate programs over President Trump’s tariff back-and-forth with Ottawa.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: DOGE staffer allegedly ran company providing services to hacking group
item.description: US Department of Government Efficiency tech advisor Edward Coristine previously ran a small infrastructure provider that offered services to a cybercriminal group, it has been alleged.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The Apple rumor machine cranks into gear for iOS 19
item.description: WWDC event marketing intensifies, and as we head toward that event in a little over two months, it looks as if we’re being told to expect a new paint job (aka user interface change)s for iOS.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ethernet roadmap: AI drives high-speed, efficient Ethernet networks
item.description: At next month’s Optical Fiber Communication Conference and Exhibition (OFC), many of the technologies that are driving current and future Ethernet development will be on full display by the Ethernet Alliance, which is set to unveil its tenth anniversary Ethernet roadmap.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: FBI warns about document conversion sites spreading malware
item.description: The FBI warns that some free online document converters load malware onto people's computers, making their private information vulnerable to attack.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft’s newest AI agents can detail how they reason
item.description: If you’re wondering how AI agents work, Microsoft’s new Copilot AI agents provide real-time answers on how data is being analyzed and sourced to reach results.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The secret to using generative AI effectively
item.description: Do you think generative AI (genAI) sucks? I did. The hype around everything genAI has been over the top and ridiculous for a while now. Especially at the start, most of the tools were flashy, but quickly fell apart if you tried to use them for any serious work purposes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Oracle releases ML-optimized GraalVM for JDK 24
item.description: Oracle has released GraalVM for JDK 24, an alternative Java Development Kit tuned to just-released JDK 24 that uses ML (machine learning)-based profile inference to boost peak performance by about 7.9% on average on microservices benchmarks, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative
item.description: The Trump administration has a '10 out, one in' rule for new regulations, but DoD officials are confident they can finalize the CMMC requirements soon. The post DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise targets IoT, industrial networks with private 5G package
item.description: Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise (ALE) has partnered with Celona to offer a turnkey private 5G package for industrial or IoT networks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Striking the balance between information sharing and security
item.description: That balancing act requires a complex response, especially when designing networks and systems for collaboration. The post Striking the balance between information sharing and security first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Two new AI tools help illuminate GSA’s future state
item.description: GSA's acting Administrator Stephen Ehikian said that the agency is breaking down the data silos to allow systems to better communicate with one another. The post Two new AI tools help illuminate GSA’s future state first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cosmonic uses WebAssembly to manage apps
item.description: Leveraging the WebAssembly binary instruction format, Cosmonic has launched wasmCloud-based Cosmonic Control, an enterprise control plane for managing distributed applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google acquires Wiz: A win for multicloud security
item.description: Google’s recent acquisition of Wiz positions the tech giant as a leader ready to tackle today’s multicloud challenges, potentially outperforming competitors such as Microsoft Azure and AWS.
item.dc:creator: Info World
